inputs.label: Dynamic Viscosity (μ)
inputs.businessContext: Fluid’s dynamic viscosity in Pascal-seconds (1 Pa·s = 1 N·s/m² = 10 P)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fluid’s dynamic viscosity in Pascal-seconds (1 Pa·s = 1 N·s/m² = 10 P)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Pascal-saniye cinsinden akışkanın dinamik viskozitesi (1 Pa·s = 1 N·s/m² = 10 P)
businessContext_i18n.de: Dynamische Viskosität des Fluids in Pascal-Sekunden (1 Pa·s = 1 N·s/m² = 10 P)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Viscosité dynamique du fluide en pascal-secondes (1 Pa·s = 1 N·s/m² = 10 P)
businessContext_i18n.es: Viscosidad dinámica del fluido en Pascal-segundo (1 Pa·s = 1 N·s/m² = 10 P)

inputs.label: Density (ρ)
inputs.businessContext: Fluid’s mass density in kg/m³ (water ≈ 1000 kg/m³)

businessContext_i18n.en: Fluid’s mass density in kg/m³ (water ≈ 1000 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akışkanın kütle yoğunluğu kg/m³ cinsinden (su ≈ 1000 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.de: Massendichte des Fluids in kg/m³ (Wasser ≈ 1000 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse volumique du fluide en kg/m³ (eau ≈ 1000 kg/m³)
businessContext_i18n.es: Densidad másica del fluido en kg/m³ (agua ≈ 1000 kg/m³)

inputs.label: Characteristic Length (L)
inputs.businessContext: Characteristic linear dimension (e.g., pipe diameter) in meters

businessContext_i18n.en: Characteristic linear dimension (e.g., pipe diameter) in meters
businessContext_i18n.tr: Metre cinsinden karakteristik doğrusal boyut (ör. boru çapı)
businessContext_i18n.de: Charakteristische lineare Abmessung (z. B. Rohrdurchmesser) in Metern
businessContext_i18n.fr: Dimension linéaire caractéristique (ex. diamètre du tuyau) en mètres
businessContext_i18n.es: Dimensión lineal característica (p. ej., diámetro de tubería) en metros

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
